# TestingRatingField

## Summary
The `TestingRatingField` is a custom field definition that can be used within a consuming card or field. It allows the representation of a testing rating.

## Import
```gts
import { TestingRatingField } from '../testing-rating-field';
```

## Usage as a Field
To use the `TestingRatingField` as a field within a consuming card or field, you can define it as follows:

```gts
@field testingRating = contains(TestingRatingField);
```

This will add a `testingRating` field to your card or field, which can be accessed and displayed in your templates.

## Template Usage
Within your card or field template, you can display the `testingRating` field as follows:

```hbs
<@fields.testingRating />
```

This will render the `TestingRatingField` component in your template, displaying the testing rating value.
